revisionStartPage.title: Bilow Dib-u-eegis
revisionStartPage.subtitle: Dooro qayb si aad u bilowdo fadhigaaga dib-u-eegista.
revisionStartPage.noCategoriesDescription: Qaybaha ayaa kasoo muuqan doona halkan marka lagu daro gobolkaaga.
revisionStartPage.missingLicenceCategory: Dooro nooca laysanka dhanka liiska ka hor intaadan bilaabin dib-u-eegista.
revisionStartPage.sessionChoiceTitle: Sii wad mise Dib u bilow?
revisionStartPage.sessionChoiceDescription: Dooro sidaad u rabto inaad uga sii wadato {category}.
revisionStartPage.completedSessionDescription: Waad dhamaystirtay fadhigan oo ku saabsan {category}. Bilow fadhi cusub ama dib u eeg isku dayadaada.
revisionStartPage.questionCountDescription: Dooro inta su'aalood ee aad ugu tababaranayso {category}.
revisionStartPage.allDoneDescription: Waad dhamaystirtay dhammaan su'aalihii ku jiray {category}. Dib u bilow si aad mar kale isugu daydo.

revisionPracticePage.title: Tababar
revisionPracticePage.questionCountSettingsDescription: Beddel dalabkaaga tirada su'aalaha ee qaybtan. Keydinta ayaa dib uga bilaabi doonta xulashada qaybta.

landingPage.heroTitle: Si Fican U Baro Imtixaankaaga Aragtida Wadista
landingPage.heroSubtitle: Ku tababaro in ka badan 800 oo su'aalood, la soco horumarkaaga, si kalsooni lehna ugu gudub imtixaankaaga aragtida wadista
landingPage.featureQuestionsDescription: Bangiga su'aalaha oo dhamaystiran oo daboolaya dhammaan qaybaha iyo mowduucyada
landingPage.featureMockDescription: Ku tababaro imtixaanka tijaabada ah oo hel jawaab celin degdeg ah
landingPage.featureLeaderboardDescription: La tartan kuwa kale oo la soco qiimeyntaada
landingPage.benefitProgressDescription: La soco waxqabadkaaga oo aqoonso meelaha u baahan horumarin
landingPage.benefitFeedbackDescription: Hel sharaxaad degdeg ah iyo talooyin dheeri ah oo ku saabsan su'aal kasta
landingPage.benefitJurisdictionDescription: Wuxuu taageeraa dalal iyo gobollo badan
landingPage.benefitAdaptiveDescription: Diiradda saar meelaha aad ku liidato adigoo adeegsanaya talooyin casri ah
landingPage.ctaTitle: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad bilowdo?
landingPage.ctaDescription: Ku biir kumanaan barteyaal ah oo ku gudbay imtixaankooda aragtida HabeshaDrive
landingPage.featuresHeading: Wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay si aad mar qura ugu gudubto
landingPage.showcaseHeading: Waxaa loo dhisay bartayaasha luuqadaha badan
landingPage.showcaseDescription: Isla markiiba ku beddel luuqadaha qayb kasta oo abka ka mid ah — su'aalo, sharaxaad, talooyin, iyo kuwo kale.
landingPage.showcaseCategoriesDescription: Ka baaro qaybaha mowduucyada habaysan oo wata dabagalka horumarka ee waqtiga dhabta ah iyo tirokoobyada saxnaanta.
landingPage.showcaseQuestionsDescription: Ku tababaro su'aalaha imtixaanka aragtida dib-u-eegista — ka jawaab, hel jawaab celin degdeg ah, oo la soco horumarkaaga.
landingPage.showcaseExplanationsDescription: Fahan jawaab kasta adiga oo arkaya sharaxaad faahfaahsan oo tixraacaysa Xeerarka Wadooyinka.
landingPage.showcaseTipsDescription: Hel talooyinka wadista ee khubarada oo wata sawirro si ay kaaga caawiyaan inaad wax ka barato wixii ka dambeeya imtixaanka.
landingPage.readyToPass: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad gudubto?
landingPage.footerCopyright: © 2025 HabeshaDrive. Dhammaan xuquuqaha way xifdisan yihiin.
landingPage.footerDvsaDisclaimer: Hay'adda Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA) ayaa bixisay oggolaanshaha in la daabaco agabka xuquuqdiisa ay leedahay Crown. DVSA ma qaadayso mas'uuliyadda saxnaanta daabacaadda.
landingPage.footerDvsaName: Hay'adda Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA)

loginPage.subtitle: Soo gal si aad u sii waddo safarkaaga waxbarasho
loginPage.passwordRequired: Erayga sirta ah ayaa loo baahan yahay
loginPage.invalidCredentials: Iimayl ama eray sir ah oo khaldan

registerPage.noLanguages: Luuqado la heli karo ma jiraan
registerPage.langConfirmedAllSet: Luuqad dheeri ah ayaa la doortay — dhammaan waad diyaarsan tahay!
registerPage.langConfirmDefault: Waxaan xaqiijinayaa inaan doonayo inaan ku sii wado luuqadda asalka ah oo keliya
registerPage.fullNameRequired: Magaca buuxa ayaa loo baahan yahay
registerPage.passwordRequired: Erayga sirta ah ayaa loo baahan yahay
registerPage.passwordMinLength: Erayga sirta ah waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 8 xaraf
registerPage.selectAtLeastOneLanguage: Fadlan dooro ugu yaraan hal luuqad
registerPage.langConfirmRequired: Fadlan dooro luuqad dheeri ah ama xaqiiji inaad rabto inaad ku sii wadato kaliya luuqadda asalka ah
registerPage.registrationFailed: Diiwaangelinta way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

practicePage.title: Xarunta Tababarka
practicePage.subtitle: Dooro hab tababar si aad u bilowdo waxbarashada
practicePage.revisionDescription: Ku tababaro su'aalaha qayb ahaan oo la soco horumarkaaga
practicePage.mockTestDescription: Geli imtixaano tababar oo buuxa si aad isugu diyaariso imtixaanka
practicePage.trafficSignsDescription: Baro oo xafid dhammaan calaamadaha taraafikada iyo macnahooda
practicePage.flagsDescription: Dib u eeg su'aalihii aad u calaamadeysay inaad dib u barato
practicePage.dvsaQuestionBank: Alaabtan waxaa ku jira bangiga su'aalaha dib-u-eegista ee Hay'adda Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA).

mockTestStartPage.noConfigDescription: Habaynta imtixaanka tijaabada ah weli lagama heli karo gobolkaaga. Fadlan la xiriir maamulahaaga.
mockTestStartPage.subtitle: Iska dhig imtixaanka dhabta ah oo la soco diyaar garowgaaga
mockTestStartPage.licenceCategoryRequired: Nooca Laysanka ayaa loo baahan yahay
mockTestStartPage.licenceCategoryRequiredDesc: Fadlan ka dooro nooca laysanka dhinaca liiska ka hor intaadan bilaabin.
mockTestStartPage.instruction1: Su'aalaha waxaa si isku mid ah looga soo qaatay dhammaan qaybaha
mockTestStartPage.instruction3: Waxaad u baahan tahay {passMark} jawaabo sax ah si aad u gudubto ({passPercentage}%)
mockTestStartPage.instruction4: Imtixaanku iskii ayuu isku gudbinayaa marka waqtigu dhamaado
mockTestStartPage.instruction5: Waad gudbin kartaa goor hore haddii aad dhameyso
mockTestStartPage.instruction6: Horumarka waa la keydiyaa haddii aad dib u cusbooneysiiso bogga

mockTestResultsPage.failedToLoadResults: Waa ku guuldareystay inuu soo shubo natiijooyinka imtixaanka
mockTestResultsPage.allCorrect: Dhammaan su'aalaha si sax ah ayaa looga jawaabay!

mockTestHistoryPage.title: Taariikhda Imtixaanka Tijaabada
mockTestHistoryPage.subtitle: Dib u eeg isku dayadii hore ee imtixaanada tijaabada
mockTestHistoryPage.takeFirstTest: Geli Imtixaankaagii Ugu Horeeyay ee Tijaabada

mockTestTestPage.invalidParams: Cabirro imtixaan oo khaldan. Fadlan ka bilow boga imtixaanka tijaabada.
mockTestTestPage.failedToLoadTest: Waa ku guuldareystay inuu soo shubo imtixaanka
mockTestTestPage.timesUpDesc: Waqtigii imtixaankaagu wuu dhamaaday. Hadda ayaan gudbinaynaa jawaabahaaga…

pricingPage.subtitle: Dooro rukunka ugu habboon safarkaaga waxbarasho
pricingPage.noPackages: Ma jiraan xirmooyin laga heli karo degaankaaga.
pricingPage.checkBackLater: Fadlan dib u eeg mar dambe ama la xiriir caawinta.
pricingPage.fullAccess: Helitaan buuxa oo su'aalaha oo dhan ah
pricingPage.notConfigured: Lama habeynin bixinta khadka tooska ah. La xiriir caawinta.
pricingPage.faqCancelAnswer: Haa, waad joojin kartaa rukunkaaga wakhti kasta. Gelitaankaagu wuxuu socon doonaa ilaa dhammaadka xilliga lacag-bixintaada.
pricingPage.faqPaymentMethods: Waa maxay hababka lacag-bixinta aad aqbashaan?
pricingPage.faqPaymentMethodsAnswer: Waxaan aqbalnaa dhammaan kaararka deynta ee waaweyn, kaararka bangiga, iyo hababka lacag-bixinta dhijitaalka ah anagoo adeegsanayna nidaamkeena xaqiijisan ee lacag-bixinta.
pricingPage.faqFreeTrialAnswer: La xiriir kooxdayada caawinta si aad wax uga weydiiso xulashooyinka tijaabada ee degaankaaga.
pricingPage.selectJurisdiction: Fadlan dooro degaan si aad u aragto xirmooyinka rukunka.
pricingPage.withTranslationDesc: Su'aalaha iyo waxa ku jira oo lagu heli karo:
pricingPage.noTranslationDesc: Waxa ku jira iyo Su'aalaha oo lagu heli karo:
pricingPage.renewsAutomatically: Si toos ah ayuu u cusboonaanayaa. Jooji wakhti kasta.
pricingPage.freeTestsExhaustedMessage: Waxaad isticmaashay dhammaan imtixaannadaadii tijaabada ee bilaashka ahaa. Isdiiwaangeli si aad u sii wadato tababarka.

paymentSuccessPage.activationDelayed: Lacag-bixinta waa la shaqeeyay laakiin hawlgelinta rukumada ayaa qaadanaysa waqti ka badan sidii la filayay. Fadlan la xiriir taageerada haddii tani sii socoto.
paymentSuccessPage.failedToVerify: Waa lagu guuldareystay xaqiijinta rukumada. Fadlan la xiriir taageerada.
paymentSuccessPage.redirecting: Waxaa laguu weecinayaa dib-u-eegista 3 ilbiriqsi gudahood...

paymentCancelPage.cancelMessage: Waxaad joojisay habka lacag-bixinta. Wax lacag ah lagama qaadin akoonkaaga.
paymentCancelPage.needHelp: Ma u baahan tahay caawinaad? La xiriir kooxdayada taageerada.

revisionHistoryPage.noCompletedSessions: Lama helin fadhiyo la dhamaystiray oo qaybtan ah.

profilePage.title: Burofaayl
profilePage.logoutConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad ka baxdo?

subscriptionModal.cancelDesc: Waan ka xunnahay bixitaankaaga. Rukumadaadu waxay ahaan doontaa mid shaqaynaysa ilaa dhamaadka xilliga lacag-bixintaada hadda — isla markiiba ma waayi doontid galaangalkaaga.
subscriptionModal.cancelNotice: Galaangalkaagu wuxuu soconayaa ilaa dhamaadka xilliga lacag-bixintaada. Majiraan isbedelo degdeg ah.
subscriptionModal.upgradeNotice: Dalacsiintaada isla markiiba waa la dabaqayaa. Waxaa lagaa qaadi doonaa lacag la qiyaasay maalmaha ka haray xilliga lacag-bixintaada hadda.
subscriptionModal.downgradeNotice: Hoos u dhigistaadu waxay hirgelaysaa dhamaadka xilliga lacag-bixintaada hadda. Waxaad haysan doontaa dhammaan astaamaha hadda ilaa waqtigaas.
subscriptionModal.cancelSectionDesc: Jooji rukumadaada waqti kasta. Waxaad dooran kartaa inaad ku joojiso dhamaadka xilliga lacag-bixintaada — isla markiiba ma waayi doontid galaangalkaaga.

flagsPage.title: Su'aalaha La Calaamadeeyay
flagsPage.subtitle: Dib u eeg su'aalihii aad calaamadaysay in aad dib u eegto

pwa.installDescription: Taabo abka mobaylka si aad si degdeg ah ugu isticmaasho
pwa.benefit1: Si toos ah uga gal shaashadda weyn
pwa.androidManual: Fur (⋮) browser-ka oo taabo "Ku dar Shaashadda Weyn" ama "Ku rakib abka"
pwa.alreadyInstalled: HabeshaDrive durba wuxuu ku rakiban yahay taleefankaaga. Ka fur taleefankaaga ama shaashadda weyn!
